ctktemplate 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

ctktemplate

Shared pkgdown template package for https://christophertkenny.com R packages.

Use

In _pkgdown.yml:

template:
  package: ctktemplate

In DESCRIPTION:

Config/Needs/website: christopherkenny/ctktemplate

This package provides the shared files in inst/pkgdown/.

License

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
